query: UPDATE workflows SET name = COALESCE($2, name), description = COALESCE($3, description), enabled = COALESCE($4, enabled), trigger_on_system_events = COALESCE($5, trigger_on_system_events), condition = COALESCE($6, condition), action_config = COALESCE($7, action_config), coalesce_window_secs = COALESCE($8, coalesce_window_secs), max_runs_per_window = COALESCE($9, max_runs_per_window), version = version + 1, updated_at = now() WHERE id = $1
